summary:
Apolipoprotein mimetic drugs have not yet entered human clinical trials. The primary reason is that they are still under preclinical development, with no completed phase I or II studies demonstrating safety and efficacy in humans. 

Note: This summary focuses only on clinically relevant facts related to whether these agents were tested in patients.
